_comment: STANDALONE Jetson (the `jetson` full-rig machine slice): it hosts its OWN etcd singleton (colony etcd.yml installs it here), so per points at the LOCAL endpoint. Superseded the L4-B shared-etcd config that pointed at the rpi4 central — the Jetson is no longer a central-dependent compute board (that was the `compute` machine slice + compute.yml).
